## What changed

- describe the user-facing or maintainer-facing change

## Why it changed

- explain the workflow gap, bug, or improvement

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run report`
- [ ] `npm run fix -- --dry-run`
- [ ] `npm run adapters:check`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run audit:pack`

## Notes

- mention any intentional limitations or follow-up work
